title: leontodon muelleri
intro: Leontodon muelleri, also known as the yellow hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leontodon muelleri include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. The herbal preparations of Leontodon muelleri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
